claim_boundary: Tier 4.32d-r1 is local source/runtime QA for explicit inter-chip MCPL route entries. It is not a SpiNNaker hardware run, not an EBRAINS package, not multi-chip execution evidence, not learning-scale evidence, not speedup evidence, not benchmark superiority, and not a native-scale baseline freeze.

criteria.name: learning source installs all three request lookup routes
state source installs value/meta reply routes
Makefile exposes inter-chip route contract target
route contract tests learning and state sides
existing MCPL lookup contract still passes
existing four-core MCPL local regression still passes
4.32d upload folder not prepared by local QA
next hardware smoke is authorized only after this local pass

source_findings.interpretation: Learning-core builds can install outbound request routes to an explicit chip link.
State-core builds can install outbound reply routes to an explicit chip link.
Source-chip learning profile can route all three lookup request types off chip.
source_findings.observed: LOOKUP_TYPE_CONTEXT/ROUTE/MEMORY request routes installed under request-link macro

source_findings.interpretation: Remote state profiles avoid broad duplicate reply routes while returning value/meta packets.
source_findings.observed: VALUE/META reply routes installed per state profile lookup type under reply-link macro

source_findings.interpretation: Host tests can inspect programmed key/mask/route entries instead of trusting comments.
The route contract is callable by CI/local validation.

summary.recommended_next_step: Tier 4.32d two-chip split-role single-shard MCPL lookup hardware smoke package/run.

test_commands.stdout:
cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -Wno-int-to-pointer-cast -I stubs -I src -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_LEARNING_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=3 -DCRA_MCPL_INTERCHIP_REQUEST_LINK_ROUTE=ROUTE_E tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_contract.c stubs/spin1_api.c src/state_manager.c -lm -o tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_learning
./tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_learning
Tier 4.32d-r1 learning-core inter-chip route contract
  PASS: learning core installs outbound request link routes
cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -Wno-int-to-pointer-cast -I stubs -I src -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_CONTEXT_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=4 -DCRA_MCPL_INTERCHIP_REPLY_LINK_ROUTE=ROUTE_W tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_contract.c stubs/spin1_api.c src/state_manager.c -lm -o tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_context
./tests/test_mcpl_interchip_route_context
Tier 4.32d-r1 state-core inter-chip route contract
  PASS: state core installs local request route plus outbound reply link routes

cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -Wno-int-to-pointer-cast -I stubs -I src -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_LEARNING_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=3 tests/test_mcpl_lookup_contract.c stubs/spin1_api.c src/state_manager.c -lm -o tests/test_mcpl_lookup_contract
./tests/test_mcpl_lookup_contract
Tier 4.32a-r1 MCPL lookup contract tests
  PASS: reply sends value plus confidence/meta packets
  PASS: receive waits for value and meta before completing lookup
  PASS: meta-before-value ordering is accepted
  PASS: shard_id prevents identical seq/type cross-talk
  PASS: wrong-shard packets cannot complete pending lookup
All Tier 4.32a-r1 MCPL lookup contract tests passed.

cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-function -Wno-int-to-pointer-cast -I stubs -I src -DCRA_USE_MCPL_LOOKUP=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_LEARNING_CORE=1 -DCRA_RUNTIME_PROFILE_DECOUPLED_MEMORY_ROUTE=1 -DRUNTIME_PROFILE_ID=3 tests/test_four_core_mcpl_local.c stubs/spin1_api.c src/state_manager.c src/host_interface.c -lm -o tests/test_four_core_mcpl_local
./tests/test_four_core_mcpl_local
Tier 4.32a-r1 four-core MCPL local integration test
  PASS: MCPL full-confidence path learns like SDP reference
  PASS: MCPL zero-confidence path blocks learning
  PASS: MCPL half-confidence path scales learning
All Tier 4.32a-r1 four-core MCPL local tests passed.

tier: Tier 4.32d-r1 - Inter-Chip MCPL Route Repair Local QA
